candidates.why: Best direct top-line revenue line; populated and not a header/total bucket.
Also represents total operating revenue, but is a total line and duplicates the direct revenue line values.
Section/header, not the numeric revenue row.

variables.notes: Use the first non-missing revenue label by year. 'Revenue from Goods & Services' is preferred; 'Revenue from Business Activities - Total' is a fallback if labels change.

candidates.why: Best direct COGS/cost of sales line; matches direct production/service costs.
Close concept but excludes depreciation, so it is less complete than the primary cost-of-revenue line.
Component only and not full COGS.
Inventory adjustment component, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the full cost-of-revenue line rather than subtotal variants/components.

candidates.why: Best explicit SG&A row that is populated and excludes D&A components listed separately.
Separate R&D line above EBIT; included in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it per rule.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Useful diagnostic row, but less preferred because explicit SG&A plus separate R&D rows already exist.
Too broad and includes COGS; should not be used when explicit SG&A exists.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Explicit SG&A exists and is populated, so use it. Added separate 'Research & Development Expense' because R&D is shown separately above EBIT and does not appear already embedded in the selected SG&A row; this allows XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD to represent SG&A excluding R&D. Excluded depreciation/amortization SG&A component rows per rule.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; ideal mapping.
Supplemental duplicate/supporting line; less preferred than the main statement row.
Capitalized amount is not the main expensed R&D line.

variables.notes: Priority list for dedicated R&D expense. Main statement row preferred; supplemental row included as fallback if label availability changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best primary recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component; should be added to capture total recurring finance cost if not already included.
Duplicate of the main interest expense amount; do not use alongside the underlying line to avoid double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple

variables.notes: Chose granular recurring interest components instead of net finance cost totals. Did not select 'Financing Income/(Expense) - Net - Total' because it includes non-interest items. Did not select both 'Interest Expense' and 'Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest' because they appear duplicative.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes minority interest, satisfying BE+MIB rule.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner equity concept and appears numerically identical; useful fallback if label changes.
Also identical here and excludes minority interest; acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Contains minority interest and would risk double counting with MIB.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses parent/common equity lines that exclude minority interest. Avoided total equity including minority interest to prevent double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; ideal for MIB.
Income statement allocation of earnings to minority interest, not balance-sheet stock measure.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Includes equity total rather than isolated minority interest; not appropriate when direct MIB exists.

variables.notes: Direct balance-sheet minority interest line selected.
